title: mikania rotundifolia
intro: Mikania rotundifolia, also known as Quina or Jacob's Ladder, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mikania rotundifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Mikania rotundifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
